items.title: Batch ML training pipelines
items.description: Production training jobs load partitioned Parquet from object storage, select feature columns with `columns=`, and cast IDs to string/category before joining labels.

items.title: Exploratory analysis on exports
items.description: Analysts load CSV exports from BI tools with `nrows` for quick probes, then reload with full dtypes once schema is understood.

items.title: Log ingestion for anomaly detection
items.description: JSONL server logs are loaded line-by-line, normalized to columns, and typed as category for event names to keep RAM bounded on long histories.

items.title: Competition-style tabular datasets
items.description: Kaggle-style CSVs ship without schema; competitors specify dtypes at read to prevent silent corruption of ID columns and reduce memory for large train sets.
